ladder.stuckTitle: The AI DM needs a hand
ladder.viewerStuckHint: The AI DM is stuck — a player at the table can help it recover.

reason.max_steps: The DM ran out of steps

ladder.nudgeHintPlaceholder: Optional hint to steer the DM (leave blank for a plain retry)…

ladder.rulesHint: Answered from the installed rule packs — no model budget spent.
ladder.voteOpenPrompt: What should the table vote on?

voteTitle.override: Vote: override the AI DM's last ruling

ladder.grantNotePlaceholder: Optional note recorded with the grant…
ladder.humanControlHint: The AI DM is frozen while a human holds the seat. Hand it back to resume AI play.
